problems and quicken the development in China. In the meantime,
                                                                                                                    it is also an important means for China to follow up a road to char-
                                                                                                                    acteristic socialism market economy. The targets of theories and
                                                                                                                    practices of development-oriented finance are to seek an effective
                                                                                                                    way to combine finance and government, finance and society,
                                                                                                                    finance and economy, and finance and market, and to boost the
                                                                                                                    overall progress and coordinated development of economy and soci-
                                                                                                                    ety by means of mechanism, system, and market construction. The
                                                                                                                    cores lie in system building, institutional improvement, market con-
                                                                                                                    struction, and credit construction. The basic features of develop-
                                                                                                                    ment-oriented finance theories are innovation, development, and
                                                                                                                    finance. Such theories and practices not only aim to deal with the
                                                                                                                    financing problem in the medium and long-term construction, more
                                                                                                                    importantly, they would also speed up the construction of system,
                                                                                                                    market, and credit, bring more energy into market, and create condi-
                                                                                                                    tions for achieving national strategic objectives.
